summary_table: In this session, Grandpa Bud explores the westward Meadows, teaching essential survival skills including advanced cooking, map marking, and time-telling using the sun. The episode culminates in a tense race against nightfall to build an emergency shelter and a detailed breakdown of weapon statistics.
editors_notes: The 'Brand Rule' is perfectly exemplified in the 'Telling Time' segment (14:43); it is a high-value educational moment that feels like a grandfather sharing wisdom. Strategic focus should be placed on the transition from the Stone Axe to the Flint Axe, as it provides a clear progression milestone for viewers.
ledger_entry: The sun rose over Terra Conrad with the promise of discovery. We began by tending the hearth, learning that a Viking's strength is only as good as the meal in his belly—balancing the red of the meat with the yellow of the fruit. With a full stomach, we pushed westward, marking the land with runes of our own making to remember where the raspberries grow thick. We encountered a beast of legend—a boar marked with a star—reminding us that the wild grows stronger the further we stray from the stones of our arrival. As the light faded and the 'Cold' debuff bit into our bones, we learned the hard lesson of the unprepared: never let the sun set without five stones for a fire. We huddled in a makeshift lean-to, repairing our broken tools by the flickering flame, emerging not just as survivors, but as craftsmen. The flint axe now hangs at our belt, a sharper edge for a sharper world. The journey continues, one day at a time.

type_a_shorts.description: How to tell time in Valheim using the sun and your mini-map. A perfect 'Grandpa Tip'.
The Three-Food Rule: Explaining the health and stamina UI for beginners.
What do the stars mean? Explaining starred creatures and the benefits of taming boars.

type_b_clips.description: The Art of the Spit: A comprehensive guide to early-game cooking and inventory management.
The Midnight Scramble: A narrative beat showing the danger of being caught without stone at nightfall.
The Blacksmith's Ledger: A deep dive into weapon stats, parry bonuses, and the value of the Flint Axe upgrade.

type_c_arc.description: The Westward Expansion: A montage of discovery, from abandoned villages to the first sight of the ocean.
From Rags to Flint: A progression arc showing the transition from basic survival to established hunter.

youtube_chapters.title: Health vs. Stamina: The Three-Food Rule
How to Mark Your Map for Resources
Encountering Starred Boars and Taming Tips

Emergency Night Shelter: Surviving the Cold
Weapon Analysis: Stone vs. Flint Axe
